sentences.english: My favorite smell is fresh bread baking in the oven, it immediately makes me feel warm and happy.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 냄새는 오븐에서 구워지는 빵이에요. 바로 따뜻하고 행복한 기분이 들어요.

sentences.english: I love the smell of rain on hot pavement, it's called petrichor.
sentences.korean: 뜨거운 보도에 내리는 비 냄새를 좋아해요. 페트리코르라고 불려요.

sentences.english: Coffee brewing in the morning is my absolute favorite, because even the smell alone wakes me up.
sentences.korean: 아침에 커피 내리는 냄새가 단연 최고예요. 냄새만으로도 잠이 깨거든요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
